home.title: AI Career Growth Partner
home.lead: PlanetX by GenZ is a cloud-based subscription service for professionals who want coaching, resume insights, personality-informed guidance, and smarter job matching — all in one place.
summaryItems: Resume parsing and job matching tools
home.featuresTitle: Built for career growth, not just job listings
home.featuresLead: PlanetX combines practical job search tools with reflective career guidance so users can grow skills, clarity, and opportunity over time.

coaching.title: AI coaching
coaching.body: Daily AI conversations to plan next steps, prepare interviews, and reflect on career direction.

resume.title: Resume insights
resume.body: Upload and parse resumes to improve positioning, keywords, and role fit.

matching.title: Intelligent matching
matching.body: Match with relevant roles using skills, preferences, and personality-informed signals.

plans.title: Subscription plans
plans.body: Start free, then upgrade to Supporter or Pro for higher limits and advanced features. Billed monthly in USD.

home.billingLead: PlanetX is a recurring SaaS subscription. You can review plans, upgrade, and cancel according to our Terms and Refund policy.
home.paymentsNote: Payments for the US region are processed in USD via Stripe (when live checkout is enabled).

pricing.title: USD subscription pricing
pricing.lead: All plans are digital SaaS subscriptions billed monthly in United States Dollars (USD). Choose your preferred payment method: Stripe, PayPal, or Airwallex. Enterprise teams can contact us for custom arrangements.
pricing.statusApi: Live pricing loaded from Looma API (region=US).
pricing.statusFallback: Pricing shown from contract fallback (API unavailable).
pricing.enterpriseBody: Need team onboarding, custom limits, or procurement paperwork? Email <1>{{email}}</1>.
pricing.footnote: Pricing contract source: Looma payment.v1.json (region=US). Cancel anytime — see <1>Refund & Cancellation</1>.
pricing.billedMonthly: Billed monthly in USD. Cancel anytime.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how PlanetX ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects personal information when you use our AI career growth SaaS at <1>genz.ltd</1> and related applications that connect to our API at <2>api.genz.ltd</2>.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
list: Account data: email address, authentication identifiers, and subscription tier.
Career content: resumes, job preferences, quiz responses, and messages you submit to AI features.
Usage data: feature usage, timestamps, device/browser metadata, and diagnostic logs.
Payment data: billing status and transaction references. Card details are processed by Stripe; we do not store full payment card numbers.

sections.title: 2. How we use information
list: Provide and improve AI coaching, resume parsing, and job matching services.
Authenticate users, enforce plan limits, and prevent abuse.
Process subscriptions, invoices, and support requests.
Comply with legal obligations and resolve disputes.

sections.title: 3. Legal bases (where applicable)
paragraphs: Depending on your region, we rely on contract performance, legitimate interests, consent (where required), and legal compliance to process personal data.

sections.title: 4. Sharing and processors
paragraphs: We may share data with service providers that help us operate PlanetX, including:
list: Cloud hosting and database providers
Stripe (payment processing)
Email and customer support tools
afterList: We do not sell personal information.

sections.title: 5. International transfers
paragraphs: Data may be processed in jurisdictions where our infrastructure or subprocessors operate. We apply appropriate safeguards where required by law.

sections.title: 6. Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. You may request deletion subject to applicable law.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, and to object to certain processing.

sections.title: 8. Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard measures such as HTTPS, access controls, and monitoring. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure.

sections.title: 9. Children
paragraphs: PlanetX is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect their data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to PlanetX, an AI career growth SaaS offered by <1>{{entity}}</1> ("Company", "we", "us") through <2>genz.ltd</2> and related products connected to our API.

sections.title: 1. Service description
paragraphs: PlanetX provides digital, cloud-hosted software including AI coaching, resume parsing, personality-informed insights, and job matching. The service is delivered online and billed as a recurring subscription unless otherwise stated.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility and accounts
paragraphs: You must provide accurate registration information and keep your credentials secure. You are responsible for activity under your account.

sections.title: 3. Subscription plans and billing
list: Plans and prices are shown on our <1>Pricing</1> page in USD.
Paid plans renew automatically each billing period until canceled.
We may change prices with reasonable notice; changes apply to subsequent renewal periods.
Taxes may apply based on your location and will be shown at checkout when applicable.

sections.title: 4. Payment processing
paragraphs: Payments are processed by Stripe or other authorized payment providers. By subscribing, you authorize us and our payment processor to charge your payment method for recurring fees.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable use
paragraphs: You agree not to misuse the service, including by:
list: Attempting unauthorized access or disrupting infrastructure
Uploading unlawful, infringing, or harmful content
Automated scraping or abuse that exceeds plan limits
Using outputs in ways that violate applicable law

sections.title: 6. AI outputs disclaimer
paragraphs: AI-generated guidance is informational and not legal, financial, or employment advice. You are responsible for decisions you make based on PlanetX outputs.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
paragraphs: We retain rights in the software, branding, and service content. You retain rights in content you submit, and grant us a limited license to process it to provide the service.

sections.title: 8. Availability and changes
paragraphs: We may modify features, impose reasonable usage limits by plan tier, or suspend service for maintenance, security, or legal reasons.

sections.title: 9. Termination and cancellation
paragraphs: You may cancel at any time before renewal as described in our <1>Refund & Cancellation Policy</1>. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the service is provided "as is". Our aggregate liability for claims relating to the service is limited to the fees you paid to us in the twelve (12) months before the claim, except where prohibited by law.

sections.title: 11. Governing law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to {{entity}}, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Disputes will be handled in the courts or forums specified by applicable law.

refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.intro: This policy explains how to cancel PlanetX subscriptions and when refunds may be available. PlanetX is a digital SaaS service billed monthly in USD.

sections.title: 1. How to cancel
paragraphs: You can cancel your subscription by:
list: Using the account billing settings in the PlanetX application (when available), or
Emailing <1>{{email}}</1> from your registered email with subject "Cancel subscription".
afterList: Cancellation stops future renewals. It does not delete your account unless you also request account deletion.

sections.title: 2. Effect of cancellation
list: Your paid features remain available until the end of the current billing period.
After the period ends, your account reverts to the Free plan limits unless you resubscribe.
No further charges will be made after a successful cancellation before the renewal date.

sections.title: 3. Refund policy
paragraphs: Because PlanetX delivers digital services immediately upon purchase, fees are generally non-refundable once a billing period has started.
We may provide a refund at our discretion when:
list: You were charged after a confirmed cancellation due to a processing error
There was a duplicate charge or technical billing mistake
Required by applicable consumer protection law

sections.title: 4. Free trials and promotions
paragraphs: If a promotional trial is offered, trial terms will be shown at signup. Unless stated otherwise, converting to a paid plan begins billing at the displayed USD monthly price. Cancel before the trial ends to avoid charges.

sections.title: 5. Chargebacks and disputes
paragraphs: Please contact <1>{{email}}</1> before initiating a chargeback so we can investigate billing issues quickly.

sections.title: 6. Enterprise customers
paragraphs: Custom contracts may include different cancellation and refund terms as specified in the signed agreement.
